title: Inbox Zero - Drafts
description: Draft email responses generated by the Inbox Zero Commander pipeline. Created by the Response Agent on first run. Drafts are reviewed in Notion before being pushed to Gmail.

Email Body.description: The drafted response text. Follows 4-part structure: greeting, acknowledgment, core response, closing. Length matches original email.

Tone.description: Detected formality level of the draft, matched to the sender's tone.

Confidence.description: Draft quality confidence score 0.0-1.0. High (>0.7): routine responses. Medium (0.5-0.7): some ambiguity. Low (<0.5): needs human review.

Status.description: Draft lifecycle status. User changes 'To Review' to 'Approved' to trigger Gmail draft creation via /inbox:drafts_approved.

Source Email.description: Gmail message link to the original email this draft responds to.

Needs Review.description: True if confidence < 0.5, email is sensitive, or draft is ambiguous. Flagged drafts appear at the top of the review queue.

Review Notes.description: Explanation of why review is needed. Populated when Needs Review is true. Examples: 'Low confidence - multiple possible interpretations', 'Sensitive topic detected'.

notes: The Response Agent searches for this database by name before creating it. The /inbox:drafts_approved command queries this database for Status='Approved' entries and creates Gmail drafts from them.
